top.title: Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged

top.title: Asha Bhosle: The sound of Bollywood dies aged 92
top.summary: Her infectious voice got fans dancing and singing, becoming the soundtrack for generations of Indians.

top.title: Civilians feared killed after reports of air strike on Nigerian market
top.summary: The Nigerian Air Force has not addressed reports it struck a village market while targeting militants.

top.summary: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.

top.title: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits

top.title: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
top.summary: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
